import _objectSpread from"C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/csr-support-system/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";import{collection,getDocs,addDoc,deleteDoc,doc,updateDoc}from"firebase/firestore";import{db}from"../firebase";// Fetch all policies
export const getPolicies=async()=>{try{const querySnapshot=await getDocs(collection(db,"knowledge_base"));const policies=[];querySnapshot.forEach(doc=>{policies.push(_objectSpread({id:doc.id},doc.data()));});return policies;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching policies:",error);return[];}};// Add a new policy
export const addPolicy=async(title,content,category)=>{try{await addDoc(collection(db,"knowledge_base"),{title,content,category,createdAt:new Date()});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error adding policy:",error);return false;}};// Update a policy
export const updatePolicy=async(id,title,content,category)=>{try{await updateDoc(doc(db,"knowledge_base",id),{title,content,category});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error updating policy:",error);return false;}};// Delete a policy
export const deletePolicy=async id=>{try{await deleteDoc(doc(db,"knowledge_base",id));return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error deleting policy:",error);return false;}};
